concept: A real-time strategy card game where two players deploy troops, spells, and buildings from an 8-card deck to destroy each other's towers within a 3-minute time limit. Players spend elixir that regenerates at a steady rate to play cards, each with unique costs and abilities, creating strategic decisions about deployment. The game features a leveling system where cards are upgraded using collected duplicates and gold, increasing their stats and effectiveness in battle.
name: Clash Royale
